input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.6.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the response value of the imd must be set to 500 ohm / volt or higher, related to the

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.6.3: The response value of the IMD must be set to 500 Ohm / Volt or higher, related to the
EV.7.6.3 The response value of the IMD must be set to 500 Ohm / Volt or higher, related to the 
maximum Tractive System operation voltage.

final_answer: The response value of the IMD must be set to 500 Ohm / Volt or higher, related to the maximum Tractive System operation voltage.
